notes: This file captures Belgium VAT rate tiers and a small curated set of notable rate/application changes with effective dates.
It is NOT a full legal VAT classification database (which depends on product/service definitions and exceptions).

notableChanges.summary: Planned VAT reclassification changes for specific hospitality/take-away/leisure items (postponed to March 1, 2026 in public reporting).

changes.note: Scope depends on exact service and legal definitions.
Scope depends on exact product definition.
Applies to specific contexts per the announced change package.

notableChanges.sourceHint: Public summaries/press articles about Belgium 2026 VAT change package (verify against Belgian official publications before relying for invoicing).

changelog.change: VAT tiers (21%, 12%, 6%) in common use; treated as baseline in this dataset.
Curated set of announced reclassifications for specific goods/services (see notableChanges).
changelog.sourceHint: Public reporting; must be verified against official Belgian publications.
